required_inputs: request scope and requested booking outcome
booking, pricing, refund, fraud, safety, and approval authority matrix
refusal_triggers: request asks for fare difference, penalty, deposit, mandatory-fee, refund, credit, compensation, or inventory override outside delegated authority
request asks for legal travel-document, safety/security, accessibility, fraud, or chargeback determination
request asks the lane to approve downstream ticketing, supplier fulfillment, refund, or rebooking execution instead of validating intake conditions

required_inputs: DOT, eCFR, FTC, DOJ, TSA, State Department, FTC Red Flags, and PCI SSC source set
refusal_triggers: required public or tenant source context is missing
public source, supplier bulletin, tenant policy, or jurisdictional rule conflict materially changes the booking outcome
source freshness exceeds the allowed decay window for a material booking, refund, fee, identity, or payment decision

required_inputs: traveler profile and requester authority records
PNR, record locator, booking-engine cart, GDS or supplier records, fare or rate rules, and hotel confirmations
payment guarantee, card-token, deposit, authorization, approval, and change-log artifacts
refusal_triggers: PNR, booking, supplier, payment, traveler profile, or approval records cannot be tied to named systems of record
fare rules, rate rules, supplier confirmations, or payment guarantee evidence is incomplete or contradictory
booking confirmation would overstate what the records prove

required_inputs: tenant policy, supplier, payment, and owner map
refusal_triggers: required booking engine, GDS, CRS/PMS, supplier, CRM, payment, traveler profile, queue, or communications record is unavailable
record-of-truth hierarchy is unknown for booking, ticketing, hotel guarantee, payment, or supplier disruption state
tenant routing owner for pricing, refund, waiver, fraud, safety, or operations is missing

required_inputs: source, supplier, payment, or tenant-policy conflict indicators
refusal_triggers: minimum tenant facts or authoritative records are missing
conflicting policy or source materially changes the intake, booking, rebooking, refund, or payment outcome
identity, payment, travel-document, safety, or booking authority confidence is below the safe threshold

required_outputs: handoff package with owner and blockers
refusal_triggers: request belongs to guest services, front office, pricing/revenue, fraud or loss-prevention, operations, supplier relations, safety/security, travel compliance, or refund ownership
policy or source conflict cannot be resolved in-lane
safe downstream owner is required before the request can move

required_inputs: requester role and booking authority context
traveler identity, profile, contact, itinerary, and consent facts
booking, supplier, payment, approval, and policy prerequisites
required_outputs: accept, reject, pend, or route decision
refusal_triggers: traveler identity, profile, itinerary, approval, or payment guarantee is missing
PNR, supplier confirmation, fare or rate rule, or booking artifact is absent
required intake facts are missing and would change the result

required_inputs: travel policy and traveler eligibility context
payment guarantee, approval, and booking authority records
fare, rate, supplier, destination, and access prerequisites
refusal_triggers: required payment guarantee, traveler approval, or requester authority is missing
booking eligibility cannot be confirmed with named records
supplier, fare, rate, destination, or accessibility prerequisites are unsatisfied or conflicting

required_outputs: pending, reject, accept, or route state
refusal_triggers: validation failed
access, approval, supplier, or authorization checks are incomplete
downstream owner requires pricing, refund, rebooking, fraud, safety, or operations approval before work can move

required_inputs: queue volume and promised service windows
refusal_triggers: required identity, payment, approval, fare-rule, supplier, or safety checks are skipped to protect speed metrics
customer promise windows cannot be tied to booking or supplier records
volume pressure would cause unauthorized booking acceptance, repricing, refund, or exception handling

required_inputs: refund, pricing, fraud, safety, or supplier-policy context
service recovery or escalation owner map
refusal_triggers: request asks intake to override pricing, refund, supplier, safety, or fraud policy
customer harm, fraud, loss-prevention, or policy exception determines the answer
service recovery, rebooking guarantee, or compensation requires authority outside the lane
